title: submit_analysis
description: Structured Quick Analysis result the coaching model MUST return via forced tool-use. The model only annotates pre-computed facts; it must not invent numbers.

noData.description: true only when there are too few games to say anything useful; insights must then be empty.

insights.description: 2-3 ideal, impact-ordered. Each is a diagnosed flaw + a concrete next-game action, never a restatement of a visible stat.

body.description: Why it costs LP at this rank + the concrete next-game action.

evidence.description: Chip text echoing a number from the provided facts, e.g. 'avgKDA 3.1 · 38% WR'. Must not contain a figure not present in the input.

benchmarkBasis.description: Set when a rate benchmark is cited; null otherwise.

confidence.description: provisional when the pattern rests on fewer than 3 games.
